prestazioni: J35Y8 3.5L V6 direct-injection engine: Full bolt-on forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (10.5 psi) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter, paired with a PRL Motorsports Stage 3 ported intake manifold and ID1000XDS fuel injectors for 450+ WHP on E85

K-Tuned 4-piston big brake kit (356mm rotors) with DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, complemented by a StopTech stainless steel brake line upgrade for TrailSport-specific front knuckle geometry

Custom Bilstein B16 coilover suspension with 2.5-inch lift, TrailSport-specific camber plates, and Whiteline 27mm front sway bar with polyurethane bushings, paired with King Shocks 2.5 Performance Series rear shocks for desert prerunning durability
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Ridgeline-specific) with carbon fiber fender flares, custom 3D-printed front splitter, and a functional rear diffuser with integrated LED light bar mounts, all finished in BASF RM WB1000 Matte Military Green

Honda Ridgeline TrailSport-specific Overland Outfitters front bumper with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch, Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED pods, and a custom aluminum skid plate with integrated recovery points

Custom 22-inch Rotiform SIX-L wheels (9.5-inch width, +15 offset) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler 285/55R22 tires, paired with TrailSport-specific fender liners trimmed for additional clearance and powder-coated in Genuine Honda Orange (NH-73M)
